creator: voidanix@420blaze.it
text:
Created attachment 203969
RedEclipseDiff

There is a bug in the game where when taking a screenshot without HUD (f11), the game will permanently make the HUD hidden until `/showhud 1` is executed.

Commit bb4b686 and ec1e32e fix this issue, so bump the port's snapshot to the latest one (54f964f)
